metadata.title: Twinkle, Twinkle (Deep Bass House Remix)
metadata.description: A deep bass house remix of Twinkle Twinkle (A Minor Lament). Preserves the Am lament progression and the original four-section structure; swaps music-box/piano/cello/strings/contrabass for a reese bass, sub, stab pad, warm pad, and detuned lead over a four-on-the-floor deep bass house kit.
